title: Positive flow: Access sharing confirmation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu. | Locate and tap on the menu icon in the header. | Locate and tap on the option to share access with family members or helpers. | Review the message: 'After you share access with your spouse, siblings or other helpers, you’ll see their activity here.'
expected_result: The message is displayed correctly. | No errors or unexpected behavior is observed.

title: Negative flow: No internet connection
preconditions: Simulate a no internet connection scenario.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu. | Locate and tap on the menu icon in the header. | Locate and tap on the option to share access with family members or helpers. | Simulate a no internet connection scenario. | Review the message: 'After you share access with your spouse, siblings or other helpers, you’ll see their activity here.'
expected_result: The message is displayed correctly. | No errors or unexpected behavior is observed.

title: Boundary validation: Empty message
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu. | Locate and tap on the menu icon in the header. | Locate and tap on the option to share access with family members or helpers. | Simulate an empty message scenario. | Review the message: 'After you share access with your spouse, siblings or other helpers, you’ll see their activity here.'
expected_result: The message is displayed correctly. | No errors or unexpected behavior is observed.

title: Usability: Navigation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu. | Locate and tap on the menu icon in the header. | Locate and tap on the option to share access with family members or helpers. | Navigate back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The app navigates back to the previous screen correctly. | No errors or unexpected behavior is observed.

title: Accessibility: Text contrast
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu. | Locate and tap on the menu icon in the header. | Locate and tap on the option to share access with family members or helpers. | Check the text contrast between the message and the background.
expected_result: The text contrast is high and readable. | No errors or unexpected behavior is observed.

title: Data persistence: Message retention
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu. | Locate and tap on the menu icon in the header. | Locate and tap on the option to share access with family members or helpers. | Close the app and reopen it. | Locate and tap on the menu icon in the header. | Locate and tap on the option to share access with family members or helpers.
expected_result: The message is retained and displayed correctly. | No errors or unexpected behavior is observed.
